code:
model = Sketchup.active_model
model.start_operation('AWARE add face', true)
pts = [Geom::Point3d.new(0, 0, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(1000.mm, 0, 0), Geom::Point3d.new(0, 1000.mm, 0)]
face = model.entities.add_face(pts)
model.commit_operation
{ 'added' => !face.nil?, 'id' => face && face.persistent_id.to_s, 'area' => face && face.area.to_f }
